tipRules.tip: Robertson: Use a 3/8-oz white swim jig with a white Berkley Chigger Craw trailer for flipping flooded bushes in 2-4 feet during the shad spawn.

knowledge.insight: Robertson: At the 2021 Classic on Ray Roberts, fished a 3/8-oz Outkast Swim Jig (white) with Berkley Chigger Craw (white), 50-lb Berkley X5 Braid, Abu REVO STX 6.6 reel, 6'8" MH Ugly Stik rod.
